name: semantic-seo-builder
description: Koray Semantic SEO pipeline for local businesses. 5-phase: Foundation (SerpAPI+Tavily+Apify research, customer voice, persona, competitor baseline), Semantic Research (Apify bulk scrape, SerpAPI PAA, entities, SERP clustering), Topical Map (SerpAPI overlap validation, hub-and-spoke + intent validation), Content (brief→write→factcheck→schema→GEO→images), Technical & Local SEO. Track 2: weekly pipeline (Tavily pre-research) + monthly audit (SerpAPI rank check, Tavily freshness). Images: Gemini 2K + GPS geotag + JPEG pipeline. Integrates claude-seo and claude-blog.
